summary: Innovative and results-driven **Senior Application Engineer** with proven success in **full-stack development, cloud architecture, and scalable enterprise solutions** across healthcare and technology domains. Adept at **leading cross-functional teams, architecting complex systems, and delivering high-performance applications** that improve user experience and business efficiency. Recognized for **technical versatility, problem-solving excellence, and mentoring talent** to achieve engineering excellence.

15+ years of experience designing, developing, and scaling **full-stack enterprise applications** in healthcare and technology. Expert in **React, .NET, Node.js, Python and cloud platforms (AWS, Azure)** with advanced skills in **AI/ML, large language models (LLMs)**. Hands-on in developing **APIs, microservices, and modernizing legacy systems into cloud-native environments**, reducing costs and improving reliability. Recognized for **mentoring engineers, leading cross-functional teams, and aligning technical strategy with business goals**.
Senior Architect with 15+ years of experience building **scalable cloud-native and full-stack applications**, with a strong focus on **modern React.js and Next.js-based frontend architectures**.

Currently leading development of a large-scale Document AI platform on GCP, including **interactive frontend applications using Angular/React patterns**, document ingestion APIs, and event-driven processing pipelines integrated with enterprise systems.

Strong expertise in **React (Hooks, component design, performance optimization), Next.js (SSR/CSR patterns), and state management solutions**, combined with backend technologies like FastAPI and Node.js.
Hands-on experience building **secure, high-performance UI applications with SSO (SAML/OAuth2/OpenID), responsive design systems, and API-driven architectures**.
Proven ability to **lead frontend engineering teams, drive code quality through reviews, define UI architecture, and collaborate cross-functionally** to deliver production-grade applications.
Passionate about building **scalable, user-centric web applications**, mentoring engineers, and delivering high-quality solutions under tight timelines.
